SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class FireCaseRelief

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.FireCaseRelief
public final class FireCaseRelief extends Object
Calculates the vapour relief load from an external pool-fire exposure per TR3001 section 4.7.8 (SR-26504) and API STD 521 section 4.4.13 using the API 521 Table 4 wetted-surface heat-input correlation.

The fire heat absorption is obtained from ReliefValveSizing.calculateAPI521FireHeatInput(double, boolean, boolean) as Q = C1 × F × Aws0.82, where C1 is 21000 BTU/hr·ft2 with adequate drainage and 34500 BTU/hr·ft2 without. The relief rate is the vapour generation rate Q / hvap, where hvap is the latent heat of vaporization at the relieving pressure.

The wetted area may be supplied directly or computed from the vessel diameter and wetted (liquid) height for the shell. API 521 limits the credited wetted area to the portion below an elevation of about 7.6 m (25 ft) above the fire source; that elevation cut-off is the responsibility of the caller when supplying geometry.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Method Details

    • setName

      public FireCaseRelief setName(String name)
      Sets the scenario name.
      Parameters:
      name - the scenario name
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setWettedAreaM2

      public FireCaseRelief setWettedAreaM2(double wettedAreaM2)
      Sets the fire-exposed wetted surface area directly.
      Parameters:
      wettedAreaM2 - the wetted area in m^2; must be positive
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setVesselDiameterM

      public FireCaseRelief setVesselDiameterM(double vesselDiameterM)
      Sets the vessel shell diameter used to derive the wetted area from geometry.
      Parameters:
      vesselDiameterM - the vessel inside diameter in m; must be positive
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setWettedHeightM

      public FireCaseRelief setWettedHeightM(double wettedHeightM)
      Sets the liquid-wetted height of the shell used to derive the wetted area from geometry.
      Parameters:
      wettedHeightM - the wetted shell height in m; must be positive
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setHasDrainage

      public FireCaseRelief setHasDrainage(boolean hasDrainage)
      Sets whether adequate drainage and firefighting exist (API 521 21000 vs 34500 BTU/hr·ft^2 basis).
      Parameters:
      hasDrainage - true if adequate drainage exists
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setHasFireFighting

      public FireCaseRelief setHasFireFighting(boolean hasFireFighting)
      Sets whether firefighting facilities are credited.
      Parameters:
      hasFireFighting - true if firefighting equipment is available
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setLatentHeatJPerKg

      public FireCaseRelief setLatentHeatJPerKg(double latentHeatJPerKg)
      Sets the latent heat of vaporization at the relieving pressure used to convert heat input to vapour rate.
      Parameters:
      latentHeatJPerKg - the latent heat in J/kg; must be positive
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

      reliefPressureBara - the relieving pressure in bara; must be positive
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • setFluid

      public FireCaseRelief setFluid(SystemInterface fluid)
      Sets the fluid used to evaluate the relieving vapour properties.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the NeqSim fluid; not null
      Returns:
      this calculator for chaining

    • calculate

      public ReliefScenario calculate()
      Calculates the fire-case vapour relief scenario.
      Returns:
      the ReliefScenario with the relief rate equal to the fire vapour-generation rate
